business_models.name: SaaS / Subscription
business_models.description: Recurring-revenue software products delivered as a hosted service

roles.name: Customer Success Manager
roles.authority_domain: Retention strategy, renewal management, health scoring

roles.name: Growth & Acquisition Manager
roles.authority_domain: Acquisition funnels, trial conversion, expansion revenue

roles.name: Subscription Revenue Analyst
roles.authority_domain: MRR/ARR tracking, churn analysis, pricing optimization

roles.name: Technical Account Manager
roles.authority_domain: Enterprise customer technical advisory, integration support

business_models.name: Marketplace / Platform
business_models.description: Two-sided platforms connecting buyers and sellers or providers and consumers

roles.name: Vendor Relations Manager
roles.authority_domain: Supplier onboarding, partner quality, vendor lifecycle

roles.name: Trust & Safety Manager
roles.authority_domain: Content moderation, fraud prevention, dispute resolution

roles.name: Marketplace Operations Analyst
roles.authority_domain: GMV tracking, take-rate optimization, liquidity metrics

roles.name: Community Manager
roles.authority_domain: Buyer/seller community engagement, feedback loops

business_models.name: E-commerce / Retail
business_models.description: Direct-to-consumer product sales via digital storefronts

roles.name: Merchandising Manager
roles.authority_domain: Product catalog curation, category management, assortment

roles.name: Fulfillment Operations Manager
roles.authority_domain: Order fulfillment, logistics coordination, returns

roles.name: Customer Experience Manager
roles.authority_domain: Shopping journey optimization, support escalation

roles.name: Pricing & Promotions Analyst
roles.authority_domain: Dynamic pricing, campaign management, margin analysis

business_models.name: Professional Services / Consulting
business_models.description: Time-and-materials or fixed-scope delivery of expert knowledge and outcomes

roles.name: Engagement Manager
roles.authority_domain: Client delivery ownership, scope management, satisfaction

roles.name: Resource & Capacity Planner
roles.authority_domain: Staffing allocation, utilization tracking, bench management

roles.name: Service Delivery Manager
roles.authority_domain: Milestone tracking, quality assurance, SLA adherence

roles.name: Knowledge Manager
roles.authority_domain: IP capture, methodology governance, reuse library

business_models.name: Media / Content / Publishing
business_models.description: Content creation, curation, and distribution products with audience-based revenue

roles.name: Content Strategy Manager
roles.authority_domain: Editorial calendar, content-market fit, format decisions

roles.name: Audience Development Manager
roles.authority_domain: Distribution channels, SEO/discovery, subscriber growth

roles.name: Rights & Licensing Manager
roles.authority_domain: IP rights, syndication agreements, usage compliance

roles.name: Editorial Operations Manager
roles.authority_domain: Production workflow, quality review, publishing cadence

business_models.name: Hardware + Software / IoT
business_models.description: Connected physical products combining firmware, hardware, and cloud services

roles.name: Hardware Program Manager
roles.authority_domain: BOM management, manufacturing coordination, certifications

roles.name: Firmware & OTA Release Manager
roles.authority_domain: Firmware lifecycle, OTA deployment strategy, rollback

roles.name: Field Service Manager
roles.authority_domain: Device fleet health, warranty, on-site repair coordination

roles.name: Supply Chain Coordinator
roles.authority_domain: Supplier management, lead time optimization, inventory

business_models.name: Internal Platform / Developer Tools
business_models.description: Internal developer platforms and toolchains consumed by engineering teams

roles.name: Developer Experience Lead
roles.authority_domain: DX metrics, onboarding friction, tooling decisions

roles.name: Platform Reliability Engineer
roles.authority_domain: SLO definition, incident response, capacity planning

roles.name: Internal Adoption Manager
roles.authority_domain: Migration planning, rollout communication, feedback

roles.name: Documentation Lead
roles.authority_domain: API docs, runbooks, architecture decision records

business_models.name: API / Data-as-a-Service
business_models.description: Productized APIs and data feeds consumed by developers and partner systems

roles.name: API Product Manager
roles.authority_domain: API versioning strategy, deprecation policy, roadmap

roles.name: Developer Relations Manager
roles.authority_domain: SDK maintenance, partner integrations, developer community

roles.name: Usage Analytics Analyst
roles.authority_domain: Consumption metering, rate-limit tuning, abuse detection

roles.name: Integration Partner Manager
roles.authority_domain: Partner certification, co-development, ecosystem strategy
